GOOG.body: $GOOG they don't have enough infrastructure capacity to meet demand already ordered -  backlog of ~$500 Billion. No growth without capex, this is a long term strategy establishing the new era of AI. Sort of like railway lines way back.
$CRWV $GOOG I almost nailed to perfection the jump between the two yesterday. Still managed to net $8,000. Just 1 minute later and I would have made double. Oh well.

$GOOG as expected, estimates obliterated but market sell-off in response. If faith in earnings remains, price not expected to go below $330 - otherwise, massive gap to fill, down to $300-310. I hope I'm wrong and we start seeing buyers take the incredible opportunity at open to bring it to fair
$GOOG burning cash faster than growth.  Main takeaway negative fcf and whether that converts to additional profits or if the AI spend gap grows wider with each progressive quarter
